title: Book Review: Charting Women’s Journeys: From Addiction to Recovery. By Judith Grant. Lanham, MD: Lexington Books, 2008, 156 pp., $60.00 (cloth). Women in Alcoholics Anonymous: Recovery and Empowerment. By Jolene M. Sanders. Boulder, CO: First Forum Press, 2009, 145 pp., $55.00 (cloth). The Language of the Heart: A Cultural History of the Recovery Movement from Alcoholics Anonymous to Oprah Winfrey. By Trysh Travis. Chapel Hill: University of North Carolina Press, 2010, 376 pp., $35.00 (cloth)
